headline: KKR’s US Army Data Centre Win And What It Means For Valuation
summary: KKR (NYSE:KKR) has been selected by the US Army, alongside Carlyle, to build and operate a large data centre on a military base. The project will rely on KKR portfolio company CyrusOne to provide digital infrastructure and support advanced AI workloads. This marks KKR's first formal role in delivering a major military data centre, tied directly to US defense and AI capabilities. For investors watching NYSE:KKR, this contract adds a new angle to a business already exposed to private markets...
